description: A designed graphic with a navy and yellow color scheme over a faint photo of officers. A cut-out megaphone graphic sits at the top beside the words 'HEY, PORTLAND!'. Large text reads 'WE ENFORCE THE LAWS' and below, in yellow, 'WE DON'T MAKE THEM.'. An ICE logo and Homeland Security seal are at the lower left.
notable_text: HEY, PORTLAND!; WE ENFORCE THE LAWS; WE DON'T MAKE THEM.; ICE
